basic_details.job_title: VNSGU Temporary Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) Temporary Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the VNSGU Temporary Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Computer Science: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI & ML), Big Data Analytics Journalism and Mass Communication: Mass Communication (Radio, TV, New Media, Photography) Public Administration: Public Administration Physics: Materials Science, Electronics, Theoretical Physics Rural Studies: Sociology Statistics: M.Sc. Statistics/M.Sc. Applied Statistics

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the VNSGU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of VNSGU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for VNSGU Temporary Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the VNSGU Temporary Assistant Professor recruitment is 28th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Temporary Assistant Professor at VNSGU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for the Temporary Assistant Professor positions at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for VNSGU recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for VNSGU Temporary Assistant Professor jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the official website of Veer Narmad South Gujarat University?
faq.answer: The official website of Veer Narmad South Gujarat University is www.vnsgu.ac.in.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is GAD/TAP/E.N./11824/2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these Temporary Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Which departments have vacancies for Temporary Assistant Professors?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in Computer Science, Journalism and Mass Communication, Public Administration, Physics, Rural Studies, and Statistics departments.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
